scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/shared && npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/shared && npm run dev --workspace @llm-inspector/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/shared && npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/backend && npm run build --workspace @llm-inspector/frontend
